g.text: Single PostgreSQL database 'butlers' • Per-butler schemas (isolated) • Shared schema (identity + memory catalog + model catalog) • Connectors schema • MCP-only inter-butler communication
shared (cross-butler identity, read-only for most butlers)
secured BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false
is_primary BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false
4. Route accepted → butler.route_inbox → target butler session
Core tables (present in every butler schema — no schema prefix at runtime)
Per-Butler Schemas (blue — one per butler, isolated from each other)
month INT, day INT, year INT
All tables are schema-qualified as travel.*
Module-Provided Tables (added to butler schema when module is enabled)
Metric definitions stored in state KV
Connectors Schema (teal — connector-owned persistent state, separate from butler schemas)
role: connector_writer (USAGE+CREATE on connectors, SELECT on shared)
id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()
INDEX: (connector_type, endpoint_identity, status, received_at DESC) -- drain queries
observes but does NOT submit to the
One row per filtered / errored message.
